case_title: PAUL LANGLEY CO. VS VERDONE, MICHAEL GLENN IND DBA THE ELEPHANT WALK

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAUL LANGLEY CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERDONE, MICHAEL GLENN IND DBA THE ELEPHANT WALK $2,799.74 PRINCIPAL, $54.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,853.74 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
